LanguageData.AM_227FURYComponents.description: 6.8 caliber modification components, including a barrel, magazine, and bolt.
LanguageData.AM_227FURYComponents.label: 6.8 upper receiver components
LanguageData.AM_338PrecisionComponents.description: Some core components of the .338LM sniper rifle, including a precision barrel, upper receiver, magazine, and sight.
LanguageData.AM_338PrecisionComponents.label: .338 precision components
LanguageData.AM_AramidCloth.description: The bulletproof aramid fiber fabric produced by Urban World has a structure that can effectively absorb impacts and resist sharp weapons. However, the disadvantage is that it is relatively heavy and cannot be produced without professional equipment.
LanguageData.AM_AramidCloth.label: aramid cloth
LanguageData.AM_ComponentWeapon.description: A bundle of weapon components, including barrels, mechanisms, and other essential parts.
LanguageData.AM_ComponentWeapon.label: weapon component
LanguageData.AM_HeavyCompositePlate.description: A bulletproof armor plate made of heavy-duty ceramic composite materials is a necessary component for producing high-performance flak vests.
LanguageData.AM_HeavyCompositePlate.label: heavy composite plate
LanguageData.AM_PKPMagazineComponents.description: Components of the PKM and PKP machine guns, including bolts and two full ammunition chain boxes.
LanguageData.AM_PKPMagazineComponents.label: PKP components
LanguageData.AM_UHMWPEPlate.description: An ultra-light armor plate made of ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene is very lightweight and has good protective performance.
LanguageData.AM_UHMWPEPlate.label: uhmwpe plate
